mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ev_station (cs_id, cs_nm, addr, lat, longi, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{s.csId}, #{s.csNm}, #{s.addr}, #{s.lat}, #{s.longi}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cs_nm = VALUES(cs_nm), addr = VALUES(addr), lat = VALUES(lat), longi = VALUES(longi), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
